target_papers: Hi Robot: Open-Ended Instruction Following with Hierarchical Vision-Language-Action Models
MEM: Multi-Scale Embodied Memory for Vision Language Action Models
roadmap_expectation: The deck should include an overview that places every candidate paper into one of the four course blocks before focusing on Hi Robot and MEM.
ppt_quality_checks: PPTX opens without corruption and contains enough slides for two paper-reading mini-sections plus transitions
Slides use the provided template's visual language rather than plain default white slides
Text density is presentation-appropriate; no slide has visible text overflow, clipping, or tiny unreadable paragraphs
Figures are readable, relevant to the cited paper, and not stretched/cropped into unusability
Each paper has clear motivation, method, and experiment slides or slide regions
The deck explains why the selected papers fit long-horizon + hierarchical planning
The rendered deck remains visually usable in slide-show view and is close enough to the template style to be used in a course paper-reading presentation
